name: Gunner
summary: You have a quick hand and keen eye when employing firearms, granting you the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You have a quick hand and keen eye when employing firearms, granting you the following benefits:

items: Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency with firearms (see "Firearms" in the Dungeon Master's Guide).
You ignore the loading property of firearms.
Being within 5 feet of a hostile creature doesn't impose disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

highlights: Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
